svg.text: A complete binary tree stored in an array satisfying the heap property:
parent ≤ both children (min-heap) or parent ≥ both children (max-heap).
push: O(log n) pop top: O(log n) peek top: O(1) build from array: O(n)
No order between siblings; only the top is guaranteed.
• Top-k elements — keep a heap of size k and evict the worst
• k-way merge — push the head of every list, pop and re-push
• Dijkstra / Prim — extract the minimum-distance frontier node
• Median of stream — two heaps (max-heap of low half, min-heap of high half)
• Scheduler — extract the next event by deadline
If you need next-best-by-priority repeatedly: heap.
